name: Afanasiy Nikitin Atlas
description: Interactive atlas + open FAIR dataset of Afanasiy Nikitin's 1467-1475 journey (per D. G. Khrustalev, 2026): 29 vanilla-JS/D3 visualisations over a machine-readable data spine (12 datasets, Frictionless datapackage), reconciled to Wikidata/GeoNames/Pleiades/VIAF, with Linked Places Format, Linked Traces, and CIDOC-CRM RDF exports and a reproducible computus.
isBasedOn: Хрусталёв Д. Г. Тетради купца Афанасия. СПб.: Нестор-История, 2026. ISBN 978-5-4469-2357-1
softwareRequirements: Python 3 (stdlib; optional: frictionless, rdflib, pandas, matplotlib)
